title: P5-05 Third-party data sharing module (reuses p1-09 classifier)
acceptance_criteria: Enumerate third-party processor domains from crawl.jsBundleUrls + crawl.networkRequests + crawl.cookies, classified by category. Reuse p1-09's domain-classification approach by importing a shared classifier if one is exported; if p1-09 does not export it, duplicate the minimal KNOWN_DOMAINS map locally (DO NOT modify p1-09)

Heuristic cross-check ONLY against privacy-policy link presence (not content): if processors present and no privacy-policy link observed, factual signal 'third-party data sharing detected; no privacy-policy link observed'
No score/verdict; moduleId 'P5-05', category 'Privacy & Compliance'; regulation refs context only
Pure function — NO new outbound request
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
